speaker: P1
text: Session start. I'm looking at the settings prototype for the first time.

speaker: P1
text: Okay, three tabs, General is open. I'll change my display name first.

speaker: P1
text: Typing feels fine. Now I expect this save button to confirm somehow.

speaker: P1
text: Hm. I clicked save and nothing happened. No message, no spinner. I can't actually tell if it saved.

speaker: P1
text: I'll switch to Appearance. The tab switch is instant, that's nice.

speaker: P1
text: Oh, I like this dark mode toggle. Immediate feedback, the whole page changes. This is how the save button should feel.

speaker: P1
text: Turning it back. The label just says dark mode whether it's on or off, so the switch has to carry the meaning.

speaker: P1
text: Back to General. My name is still here, so maybe it did save earlier. The button just doesn't say so.

speaker: P1
text: If I could fix one thing it would be save feedback. A toast or a brief disabled state would do.

speaker: P1
text: That's the end of the session. Stopping the recorders now.
